title: AI Business Idea Validation Capability Pack Skill
copyText:
Install:

Usage:
Use this skill to validate AI product ideas against demand, pain intensity, willingness-to-pay, and execution constraints.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Apply the AI business idea validation capability pack."

# Required output
1) Problem and buyer segmentation
2) Demand signals and competitor map
3) Pricing and offer hypothesis
4) Go/no-go decision with evidence
